title: AuditEventSchema
description: A single entry in AutoCode's global, append-only, hash-chained audit log. Distinct from the PolicyDecision decision-chain: this chain is chronological and tamper-evident across the whole system, not per-proposal.

correlation.description: Cross-references into the decision chain, for reconciling audit-chain order against per-proposal history.

event_payload_hash.description: sha256 of the full underlying object this event records (e.g. the PolicyDecision or HILDecision document).

previous_event_hash.description: event_hash of the immediately preceding AuditEvent in the global chain. First event uses a fixed genesis value.

event_hash.description: sha256 over (previous_event_hash + event_payload_hash + event_type + timestamp). Any retroactive edit to any prior event invalidates every event_hash after it.
